---
title: "The Rev. Canon John James Lias"
---

## The Rev. Canon John James Lias

**Dates:** (1824-1923)

### Description

Chancellor of Llandaff Cathedral

### Biography

His obituary is in <i>The Times</i> (19 March 1923).

### Letters

- Letter from May 14 [1900]
- Letter from May 12 [1900]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
